expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy stages a deterministic synthetic definition ID while Shopify returned the live-store definition ID.
The standard product-attribute template points at a shop-local standard metaobject definition ID; the proxy uses a deterministic synthetic MetaobjectDefinition GID.

notes: Captured Shopify Admin API 2025-01 behavior for enabling the PRODUCT `shopify.material` standard metafield definition. The target strictly compares the mutation payload shape, access defaults, list.metaobject_reference type, category constraint key and first five category constraint values; live definition and metaobject-definition IDs are carved out as volatile.
